query_title: The Richest Woman in the World

recommendations.title: A Matador's Mistress
recommendations.overview: Scandal erupts over a famous bullfighter's affair with a left-wing actress.

recommendations.title: Dear Mother
recommendations.overview: One day, Jean-Louis discovers that his heart has stopped. He is not dead, can walk and talk, but his heart is no longer beating. With the help of his wife and a friend, he tries to understand the origin of this mystery.

recommendations.title: There's Still Tomorrow

recommendations.title: Elle
recommendations.overview: When Michèle, the CEO of a gaming software company, is attacked in her home by an unknown assailant, she refuses to let it alter her precisely ordered life. She manages crises involving family, all the while becoming engaged in a game of cat and mous

recommendations.title: Under the Same Roof
recommendations.overview: Nadia and Adrián starts their particular world war when she files to divorce him.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Macadam Stories
recommendations.overview: Improbable encounters bring tenderness, laughter and compassion to a world of urban alienation.

recommendations.title: As Good as It Gets
recommendations.overview: A misanthropic author, a single mother and waitress, and a gay artist form an unlikely friendship after the artist is assaulted in a robbery.

recommendations.title: Voyeur
recommendations.overview: Legendary journalist Gay Talese unmasks a motel owner who spied on his guests for decades. But his bombshell story soon becomes a scandal of its own.

recommendations.title: No Mercy
recommendations.overview: A woman seeks to take revenge when her younger sister disappears and she finds out that her sister suffered violence and sexual abuse from school bullies.
